about.label: About me
about.title: My essence
about.p1: I am a hardworking, honest and passionate person about technology. I am always ready to learn new skills and face new challenges.
about.p2: I have six years of continuous training in programming and web design, specializing in React, JavaScript and HTML/CSS. I love creating digital experiences that are both functional and visually appealing.
about.p3: I am friendly, collaborative and can work both independently and as part of a team. I am motivated to keep growing professionally and contribute to innovative projects.

simpson.description: Dynamic character explorer with REST API consumption and real-time filtering.
simpson.fullDescription: Interactive web app that consumes The Simpsons public API to display detailed information about characters, locations and episodes. Implements a real-time search system with instant filtering, allowing users to explore the Simpsons universe intuitively.

cityplanner.description: Comprehensive platform for searching and managing cultural and music events.
cityplanner.fullDescription: Fullstack web platform designed to centralize the search and management of cultural and music events in the city. Includes user authentication, advanced filters and a responsive interface.

retrogames.description: Interactive guide and catalog of classic arcade games with an admin panel.
retrogames.fullDescription: Web catalog dedicated to preserving and documenting the history of classic arcade video games. Includes a complete CRUD panel and a retro design that pays homage to the arcades of the 80s and 90s.

santcugat.description: Backend service for managing sports entities and facility reservations.
santcugat.fullDescription: REST API in C# with ASP.NET Core to manage the municipal sports ecosystem. Implements Entity Framework, JWT authentication and layered architecture.

android.description: Mobile app for managing activities and loyalty programs in libraries.
android.fullDescription: Android app to connect users with the municipal library network. Includes gamification, push notifications and synchronization with the central system.

desktop.description: Desktop administrative manager for the library and events network.
desktop.fullDescription: Desktop application in C# for the complete administration of municipal libraries. Includes statistical reports, fine management and synchronization between branches.

playback.description: Full-stack marketplace for retro products with three roles: customer, seller and administrator.
playback.fullDescription: Complete e-commerce with cart, Stripe payments, stock management, reviews, favorites, JWT and OAuth 2.0 authentication, dark/light mode, ES/EN internationalization and deployed on Render.

contact.label: Let's talk
contact.title: Let's connect
contact.description: I am passionate about transforming ideas into digital products with soul. Whether to collaborate on a new project or simply chat about code, my inbox is always open.
contact.name: Full name
contact.message_placeholder: Tell me about your project or idea...
contact.success: Message sent! I will get back to you as soon as possible.
